title: Would You Rather
description: Play the classic would-you-rather game with wild scenarios

questions.question: Would you rather have the ability to fly or be invisible?
questions.explanation: Both are top picks! Most people choose flying for the freedom.

questions.question: Would you rather live without music or without movies?
questions.explanation: Music tends to win — it's woven into everyday life.

questions.question: Would you rather always be 10 minutes late or 20 minutes early?
questions.explanation: Early birds get the worm (and less stress).

questions.question: Would you rather have unlimited free food or unlimited free travel?
questions.explanation: Most pick travel — food you can work for, experiences are priceless.

questions.question: Would you rather know every language or play every instrument?
questions.explanation: Languages open up the whole world. But instruments win hearts!

questions.question: Would you rather have a rewind button or a pause button for life?
questions.explanation: Fix mistakes vs. savor moments — the eternal debate.

questions.question: Would you rather never use social media again or never watch TV again?
questions.explanation: Social media is the more common sacrifice — real connections win.

questions.question: Would you rather have a personal chef or a personal trainer?
questions.explanation: Abs are made in the kitchen, they say!
